title: More Retail is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: More Retail is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the More Retail family as a E-commerce Executive in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!
